title: Remove deprecated mypy option
body:
* "no_strict_optional = true" has been deprecated by mypy. This change removes linting errors.

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

comments.body: I didn't find the deprecation notice but since ["it's evil"](https://mypy.readthedocs.io/en/stable/config_file.html#confval-strict_optional) let's remove it and work on fixing the type checks

It seems that disabling this option exposed several issues. I think we should address them.

PTAL @jwhonce
@inknos @Honny1 Please review now that tests pass.
@jwhonce, can you please rebase on main? Thanks
